arts.ttl: When is Real Madrid vs Borussia Dortmund? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Having suffered a surprise defeat on matchday two, holders Real Madrid will bid to get their Champions League campaign back on track when they host Borussia Dortmund - the team they beat in last season’s final . The Champions League matchday-three game between Real Madrid and Borussia Dortmund will be played at the Estadio Santiago Bernabéu in Madrid, Spain, on Tuesday October 22, 2024.
